tasks.message: Programmatic task dispatch: select the highest-priority actionable task from TASKS.yaml and dispatch it to the appropriate machine/branch base agent.
Programmatic task auto-archive: scan all TASKS.yaml, archive completed tasks older than 3 days to tasks-archive.md
Programmatic memory index regen: rebuild experiments/knowledge/patterns index.md from frontmatter + update ref counts from access-log

[Scheduled Task] Execute /orient full — comprehensive situational assessment. Full project scan, machine state, cross-session patterns, task inventory, mission gap analysis, gravity signals, compound opportunities, risks.
